name: AFFIRM-LITE fisetin frailty and inflammation registry
summary: Phase 2 randomized double-blind placebo-controlled fisetin trial in older adults, using blood inflammation markers as the primary endpoint and with no posted results in the June 11, 2026 ClinicalTrials.gov API check.
population: Older adults in an invitation-enrolling fisetin frailty and inflammation study.

trial_details.horizon_note: Month-only registry dates were normalized to the first day of the month in structured fields.
trial_details.why_it_matters: AFFIRM-LITE is a direct aging-relevant fisetin trial, but it is no-results context until data are posted.
